title: smithing templates descriptions
description: This mod for Minecraft replaces smithing template item names with detailed, multi-line descriptions including usage, duplication, and lore. It enhances in-game clarity and immersion beyond what resource packs can achieve.
body: # Smithing Template Descriptions A Minecraft Fabric mod that enhances all smithing templates with detailed, formatted tooltips and improved display names. Say goodbye to generic tooltips and hello to rich, immersive descriptions! --- ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5063b6593568143e49050aabd0d419128e262a95.png) ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22b29c35e0a19dc6937847536c15e85213770a30.png) ![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef734a0be1e20b2156411ba5ca8006f70547092b.png) --- **This mod enhances all smithing templates, including:** ### Armor Trim Templates: - **Coast**, **Dune**, **Eye**, **Host**, **Raiser**, **Rib** - **Sentry**, **Shaper**, **Silence**, **Snout**, **Spire** - **Tide**, **Vex**, **Ward**, **Wayfinder**, **Wild** - **Bolt**, **Flow** --- ## Installation 1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) 2. Download **Smithing Template Descriptions** mod 3. Download **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** 4. Place both `.jar` files into your `/mods` folder --- ## Compatibility This is a **client-side visual enhancement** and should work with most mods. If any incompatibilities occur, please report them. ---
